_comment: Run-on-4090 profile. Loaded ONLY when KEITHVISION_PROFILE=4090 (see Program.cs / tools/run-on-4090.ps1). Moves LTX BF16 video onto the 4090 so the 5090 is free for gaming. Because GpuIndex then matches LocalLlm:GpuIndex (1), the prompt LLM yields its VRAM before each BF16 generation (PromptVramCoordinator). NVFP4 (ComfyUI) stays on the 5090 and is unavailable in this profile.
